Title: Bánh Mì Phượng
Note: My people don’t eat cheese and Banh mi

Title: Bánh mì Hà
Note: Great Banh mi at 25k each. Aunty toasted our Banh mi. We got fresh fried eggs and pork floss. Slaps.

Title: Hadi Coffee
Note: We enjoyed people watching from their outdoor seating. Good salted cream matcha latte. Eric got the lemon coffee - it was not offensive but it was also not something I would strive for in life

Title: Bún thịt nướng Bà Trai
Note: Love their Bo la lot (beef with la lot leaves idk English leaf name). Great assortment of vegetables - nice sauce

Title: Trầm hương thùy duyên.垂缘沉香
Note: Agarwood store - local recommended. Eric got free extra beads for his bracelet. Has jewelry and incense and some sandalwood products too

Title: Madam Khanh - The Banh Mi Queen
Note:
Local recommends. Pretty good banh mi (their sauce and pate are nice) Flavor leans more on savory and sweet. Egg sandwich has tomato 🙂‍↕️
Either we got the wrong order or their mild spice is actually very spicy.

Title: Le Ngoc Anh Cosmetics
Note: Lots of Asian beauty (skincare + makeup) - have some western brands as well

Title: HỦ TIẾU NAM VANG QUỲNH ANH ĐÀ NẴNG
Note: Solid hu tieu - Nam Vang style if you really need a hu tieu fix in Central Vietnam

Title: Bánh Xèo Bà Dưỡng
Note: Delicious - but nem nuong (grilled pork) was average
